tasks.description: TMPDIR rename: mechanical find-and-replace of all TMPDIR occurrences in install.sh to HARNESS_TMPDIR. Pure rename, no behavioral change. 12 occurrences total (see Reference Sweep Checklist in exec plan). After completion, grep TMPDIR install.sh must return zero matches and grep HARNESS_TMPDIR must return matches for all 12 sites.
tasks.notes: Already completed in prior commit -- all 12 TMPDIR occurrences renamed to HARNESS_TMPDIR, verified by grep.

tasks.description: VERSION removal and version derivation: (1) git rm VERSION and src/VERSION, (2) add get_manifest_version() helper function after get_manifest_checksum() in install.sh, (3) replace VERSION file reads in both update flow and fresh-install flow with Git tag derivation via git describe --tags --abbrev=0 with dev fallback, (4) remove the VERSION) case arm from get_category(), (5) replace the local VERSION read in the update flow Step 2 with manifest-based version read using get_manifest_version(). Covers R-1, R-4.1-R-4.3 version derivation parts.

Manifest relocation, migration, and sidecar cleanup: (1) update all manifest paths from .harness-manifest.json to .harness/manifest.json in install.sh (update flow Step 4/Step 9, fresh-install flow line 341), (2) add mkdir -p $TARGET/.harness before manifest writes, (3) add migration block (Step 1.5) to archive old .harness-manifest.json as .bak during updates, (4) add .harness/*) case arm to get_category() returning harness-owned, (5) add cleanup_stale_sidecars() helper function and call it in both update flow (after Step 1.5) and fresh-install flow (before per-file copy loop). Covers R-2, R-7.

Reference sweep and tech debt cleanup: (1) run exhaustive grep for VERSION (file-path context), .harness-manifest.json, and TMPDIR across entire repo excluding docs/exec-plans/completed/ and fix any remaining references, (2) verify seed.md parity (both live and src/ versions), (3) move NB-1 from Active to Closed in docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md with resolution text, (4) confirm docs/exec-plans/active/readme-improvements.md is absent, (5) run all AC-3 and AC-4 grep checks to verify zero stale references. Covers R-3, R-4.5, R-5, R-6.

cleanup_notes: Removed stale untracked file docs/exec-plans/active/readme-improvements.md -- the completed copy already exists at docs/exec-plans/completed/readme-improvements.md
